## Escalation cohort (10) — RECOMMENDATION

All 10 have had multiple email touches with no response. Per ops rules: **no LinkedIn**. Two options for Duncan:

1. **Phone-first this week** — most have a phone on file. Duncan's 1-on-1 strength fits here.
2. **Pause to mid-July** — re-engage post-June-1 once storm activity creates a fresh hook.

The drafted final email is light-touch and includes a soft "last note" framing so silence ≠ damaged future re-engagement.

## Initial cohort (10) — Palm Beach County

All net-new to outreach. Uses listing-first template (free directory listing → no PA solicitation risk). Two real estate orgs included — the template handles them via category mapping.

- CAN-SPAM opt-out: present in every draft
- FL Stat. 626.854: no PA-solicitation language; framing is referral-directory only
- LinkedIn drafts: zero (per 2026-05-19 policy)

## Cross-check note

This cron's drafts/ workflow runs in parallel with the live `outreach_send.py` / `drip.py` pipeline. These markdown drafts are for Duncan's manual review/send — they are **not** auto-queued for the send pipeline.
